summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification: Custom descriptions saving to collection_settings - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend APIs (PUT/GET collection settings, storefront collection API) correctly save and return custom_description. Frontend Bulk Category Editor modal contains both 'Description Template' and 'Collection Page Description' textareas with proper data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PUT /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name} correctly saves custom_description to collection_settings
VERIFIED: GET /api/tiles/collection/{series_name} (storefront API) returns custom_description from collection_settings
VERIFIED: E2E flow - save description via admin API, retrieve via storefront API - works correctly
VERIFIED: PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-description endpoint exists and responds correctly
VERIFIED: Bulk Category Editor modal opens with 'Edit Categories' button (data-testid='bulk-category-btn')
VERIFIED: Description Template textarea present with placeholder showing {color}, {material}, {size}, {finish} placeholders
VERIFIED: Collection Page Description textarea present (data-testid='collection-page-description-textarea')
VERIFIED: Save Collection Description button present (data-testid='save-collection-description-btn')
VERIFIED: Clear button present for collection description (data-testid='clear-collection-description-btn')
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Atlantic and Canopy series data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: saveBulkDescriptionSettings now saves to collection_settings in addition to individual products. The Clear button uses getSeriesName() for consistent series name extraction. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_description_collection_settings.py can be run with: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://feature-verification-7.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_bulk_description_collection_settings.py -v
